title: Brewing Guide Sidebar
description: Potion recipe guide for the brewing stand
body:
<details>
<summary>Supported Languages</summary>

[Request support for a language](https://forms.gle/PZ7kdebU5nwDpEHZ9)

- English
- Afrikaans
- Arabic
- Asturianu
- Azərbaycanca
    - Spanish (España)
    - Spanish (Argentina)
    - Spanish (Chile)
    - Spanish (Ecuador)
    - Spanish (México)
    - Spanish (Uruguay)
    - Spanish (Venezuela)
- Czech (Česko)
- Danish (Danmark)
- Deitsch (Österreich)
- Swiss German (Schwiiz)
- German (Deutschland)
- French (France)
- Swedish (Svenska)
- Maltese (Malti)
- Norwegian Nynorsk (Noreg)
- Norwergian Bokmål (Norge)
- Polish (Polska)
- Silesian (Gōrny Ślōnsk)
- Portugese (Brasil)
- Portugese (Portugal)
- Romanian (România)
- Russian (Россия)
- Ukrainian (Україна)

</details>


![Brewing Stand UI with the recipe guide sidebar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eJotPI4I/images/88c480dce44cfa233a03e1225c6800af9f8b7c94.png)

## Credit
- [DMBuce](https://github.com/DMBuce) is the author of the pixelart item glyphs visible in the recipe graph
- I am responsible for everything else in this resource pack
- Monetization weight for myself is set to zero
